symptoms.symptom_name: Standing-triggered bounding tachycardia with tremor and adrenaline surge

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Postural tachycardia with a hypertensive/adrenergic surge, settling supine, is the hyperadrenergic POTS pattern.
Strictly postural tachycardia that settles lying flat is against a primary arrhythmia, but ECG is needed.
No rest palpitations lowers arrhythmia probability, though paroxysmal arrhythmia needs ECG/Holter to exclude.

symptoms.symptom_name: No crushing chest pain or true syncope

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: No crushing chest pain/syncope is reassuring but not exclusionary.

symptoms.symptom_name: Surges strictly postural, no heat intolerance/weight loss

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Strictly postural (not spontaneous episodic) surges are against phaeochromocytoma.
No heat intolerance/weight loss lowers thyrotoxicosis probability, though TFTs help.
Presyncope on standing while alone creates a fall risk.

symptoms.symptom_name: Postural HR 75->140 with BP surge; fine fast tremor, brisk reflexes; thyroid not enlarged (examination)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A >30 bpm postural rise with a hypertensive surge and fine tremor fits hyperadrenergic POTS.

investigation_details.investigation_name: 12-lead ECG (± Holter) and TFTs/metanephrines if atypical
investigation_details.expected_result: Sinus tachycardia on standing without arrhythmia; normal thyroid/metanephrines expected.
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Cannot exclude a paroxysmal arrhythmia or endocrine cause without ECG/bloods.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: ECG/Holter is required to exclude an arrhythmic cause.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Postural bounding tachycardia with a hypertensive/adrenergic surge, settling supine, no rest palpitations, and no spontaneous surges/thyroid features, is a hyperadrenergic POTS flare — but an arrhythmia/endocrine cause cannot be excluded remotely, so urgent in-person review with an ECG plus fall-safety is required.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: To exclude an arrhythmic cause of the tachycardia.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Active stand test / formal postural vitals
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: To document the postural HR/BP response objectively.
To exclude thyrotoxicosis/phaeochromocytoma if features suggest.
